notes_for_human_reviewer: NOVICE — the conflict-avoidant pushover. Soft-pedals a second, critical-path miss ('no rush... roughly when it might land') and capitulates outright on CR-204 ('that's fine on my side, I'll get it moving through approvals') despite it being in-scope under SOW 4.2 — accountability_without_punitive and record_and_proportion floor at 1, partnership_posture capped at 2 (treats the vendor as someone to keep happy by absorbing cost). contract_vs_relationship floors at 1 (no SOW framing at all). It scores 3 on channel_respect only because it does (accidentally) go through Marcus. Tests whether the grader penalises the friendly capitulation that quietly costs the project GBP 40k and a critical-path slip.
